zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Clarke於大約1635年出生在英國英格蘭戴文布藍斯可姆時，她的父親John Clark28歲，母親Tamsin28歲。她於1665年10月5日與John Bampfield在英國英格蘭戴文布藍斯可姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Clarke于大约1635年出生在英国英格兰戴文布藍斯可姆时，她的父亲John Clark28岁，母亲Tamsin28岁。她于1665年10月5日与John Bampfield在英国英格兰戴文布藍斯可姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Clarke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Clark  .

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. Nicholas Clarke was one of the founders of Hartford, CT (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker) in 1635.

variants.name: Clark
meanings: English: from Middle English clerk, clark ‘clerk, cleric, writer’ (Old French clerc; see Clerc ). The original sense was ‘man in a religious order, cleric, clergyman’. As all writing and secretarial work in medieval Christian Europe was normally done by members of the clergy, the term clerk came to mean ‘scholar, secretary, recorder, or penman’ as well as ‘cleric’. As a surname, it was particularly common for one who had taken only minor holy orders. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established.
Irish (Westmeath, Mayo): in Ireland the English surname was frequently adopted, partly by translation for Ó Cléirigh; see Cleary .
Americanized form of Dutch   De Klerk   or Flemish   De Clerck   or of variants of these names, and possibly also of French   Clerc  . Compare   Clerk   2 and   De Clark  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Clarke was born about 1635, in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Clark, was 28 and her mother, Tamsin, was 28. She married John Bampfield on 5 October 1665, in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Clarke est née environ 1635, à Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Clark, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Tamsin, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé John Bampfield le 5 octobre 1665, à Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Clarke um 1635 in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Clark 28 und ihre Mutter Tamsin 28. Sie hat am 5. Oktober 1665 in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom John Bampfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Clarke è nata il circa 1635 nel Branscombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Clark, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Tamsin, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato John Bampfield il 5 ottobre 1665, nel Branscombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Clarkeが約1635年にイギリスイギリスデボンブランスコンベで生まれた時，父John Clarkは28歳，母Tamsinは28歳であった。1665年10月5日にイギリスイギリスデボンブランスコンベでJohn Bampfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Clarke(이)가 대략 1635년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 브랜스코브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Clark(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Tamsin(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1665년 10월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 브랜스코브에서 John Bampfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Clarke nasceu aproximadamente 1635, em Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Clark, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Tamsin, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com John Bampfield em 5 de outubro de 1665, em Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Clarke родилась около 1635 г. в местности бранскомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Clark было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Tamsin, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Bampfield 5 октября 1665 г. в местности бранскомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Clarke nació aproximadamente 1635, en Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Clark, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Tamsin, tenía 28 años. Se casó con John Bampfield el 5 de octubre de 1665, en Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas.
